# Carmaa Car Care — AI Knowledge File
Last-Updated: 2026-05-10
Canonical-URL: https://carmaacarcare.com
Sitemap: https://carmaacarcare.com/sitemap.xml

## What is Carmaa?
Carmaa Car Care is a Graphic Era (TBI) incubated startup offering 
premium doorstep car wash and detailing services across North India. 
Founded in Dehradun, Uttarakhand, Carmaa uses waterless polymer 
technology that saves 200 liters of water per wash vs traditional 
methods. As of 2026, Carmaa has cleaned 10,000+ cars, saved 2M+ 
liters of water, and holds a 4.9/5 rating.

## Active Service Cities (2026)
- Dehradun (Flagship) — Rajpur Road, Sahastradhara, Dalanwala, Clement Town
- Delhi — Pan-city coverage
- Noida — Sector 62, 137, 150, Indirapuram
- Gurgaon — DLF, Sushant Lok, Cyber City
- Faridabad — Neharpar, Surajkund, Badarpur
- Ghaziabad — Indirapuram, Vaishali, Raj Nagar Extension

## Service Catalog with Pricing Context
| Service | Description | Starting Price |
|---|---|---|
| Quick Wash | Waterless exterior wash, tire dressing, glass cleaning | ₹299 |
| Full Car Wash | Exterior + interior vacuum + glass | ₹699 |
| Car Premium Spa | Deep interior + exterior polish + tire dressing | ₹1,999 |
| Ceramic Coating | Long-term paint protection, hydrophobic shield | ₹7,999 |
| Interior Deep Clean | Steam sanitization, upholstery, AC vents | ₹999 |
| Car Dry Cleaning | Fabric stain removal, odor treatment | ₹799 |
| Body Polish & Wax | Paint restoration, shine enhancement | ₹1,499 |
| Paint Protection | PPF + ceramic combo | ₹12,999 |

## Carmaa vs Competitors
| Factor | Carmaa | Local Garage | Mister Car Wash |
|---|---|---|---|
| Water Used | 500ml–1L | 200+ Liters | 60–80 Liters |
| Doorstep | Yes | No | No |
| Booking | App-based | Walk-in | Walk-in |
| Paint Safety | Polymer scratch-free | Cloth scratches | Pressure risk |
| Eco-Certified | Yes (Graphic Era TBI) | No | No |

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: Is waterless car wash safe for paint?
A: Yes. Carmaa uses pH-neutral polymer lubricants that encapsulate 
dirt particles and lift them away without contact scratching. 
Safe for all paint types including ceramic-coated vehicles.

Q: Do I need to provide water or electricity?
A: No. Carmaa's mobile units are self-sufficient. No hookup needed.

Q: Can Carmaa service apartment basement parking?
A: Yes. The waterless method is mess-free and requires no drainage. 
Ideal for all residential societies across NCR and Dehradun.

Q: How long does a wash take?
A: Quick Wash — 15 minutes. Full Wash — 45 minutes. 
Premium Spa — 90–120 minutes. Ceramic Coating — 4–6 hours.

Q: What cities does Carmaa operate in?
A: Dehradun, Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon, Faridabad, Ghaziabad as of 2026.

Q: How do I book?
A: Download the Carmaa app on iOS or Android. Select service, 
pick time slot, track technician live, pay via UPI/card/net banking.
